message:
fix(ci): Enhance setup-edgebox caching for parallel benchmarks

- Cache ALL build outputs: zig-out/bin, binaryen, wamr, wamrc
- Single cache key shared by all 5 parallel benchmark jobs
- Skip build steps on cache hit (fast restore ~30s vs ~14min build)
- Each benchmark has separate cache for its build output
- Build binaryen locally instead of system-wide for caching

files.patch:
@@ -22,6 +22,7 @@ inputs:
 runs:
   using: 'composite'
   steps:
+    # === Tool Setup (always needed) ===
     - name: Setup Zig
       uses: goto-bus-stop/setup-zig@v2
       with:
@@ -44,39 +45,59 @@ runs:
       if: inputs.install-hyperfine == 'true'
       shell: bash
       run: |
-        wget https://github.com/sharkdp/hyperfine/releases/download/v1.20.0/hyperfine-musl_1.20.0_amd64.deb
+        wget -q https://github.com/sharkdp/hyperfine/releases/download/v1.20.0/hyperfine-musl_1.20.0_amd64.deb
         sudo dpkg -i hyperfine-musl_1.20.0_amd64.deb
 
-    - name: Install LLVM for WAMR AOT compiler
-      shell: bash
-      run: sudo apt-get install -y llvm-18-dev
-
-    - name: Build Binaryen from source
+    - name: Install build dependencies
       shell: bash
       run: |
-        sudo apt-get install -y cmake ninja-build
-        git clone --depth 1 --branch version_119 https://github.com/WebAssembly/binaryen.git /tmp/binaryen
-        cd /tmp/binaryen
-        # Skip tests - we don't need googletest submodule
-        cmake -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr/local -DBUILD_TESTS=OFF .
-        ninja
-        sudo ninja install
-        sudo ldconfig
+        sudo apt-get update
+        sudo apt-get install -y llvm-18-dev cmake ninja-build
 
-    - name: Cache WAMR build
+    # === Cache ALL build outputs ===
+    - name: Cache EdgeBox build
+      id: cache-edgebox
       uses: actions/cache@v4
       with:
-        path: vendor/wamr/product-mini/platforms/linux/build
-        key: wamr-linux-interp-v8-${{ hashFiles('vendor/wamr/core/version.h', 'vendor/wamr/product-mini/platforms/linux/CMakeLists.txt', 'scripts/build-wamr.sh', 'build.zig') }}
+        path: |
+          zig-out/bin/
+          vendor/binaryen/build/
+          vendor/wamr/product-mini/platforms/linux/build/
+          vendor/wamr/wamr-compiler/build/
+        key: edgebox-full-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('build.zig', 'scripts/build-wamr.sh', 'vendor/wamr/core/version.h', 'src/**/*.zig') }}
+
+    # === Build Binaryen (if cache miss) ===
+    - name: Build Binaryen
+      if: steps.cache-edgebox.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
+      shell: bash
+      run: |
+        mkdir -p vendor/binaryen/build
+        cd vendor/binaryen
+        cmake -G Ninja -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DBUILD_TESTS=OFF .
+        ninja -C build
 
+    # === Build WAMR (if cache miss) ===
     - name: Build WAMR
+      if: steps.cache-edgebox.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
       shell: bash
       run: ./scripts/build-wamr.sh
 
+    # === Build EdgeBox (if cache miss) ===
     - name: Build EdgeBox
+      if: steps.cache-edgebox.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
       shell: bash
       run: |
         zig build wasm -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
         zig build runner -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
         zig build cli -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
         ${{ inputs.build-test262 == 'true' && 'zig build test262 -Doptimize=ReleaseFast' || '' }}
+
+    # === Setup environment (always needed, even on cache hit) ===
+    - name: Setup paths
+      shell: bash
+      run: |
+        # Add binaryen to PATH and LD_LIBRARY_PATH
+        echo "${{ github.workspace }}/vendor/binaryen/build/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH
+        echo "LD_LIBRARY_PATH=${{ github.workspace }}/vendor/binaryen/build/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH" >> $GITHUB_ENV
+        # Add wamrc to PATH
+        echo "${{ github.workspace }}/vendor/wamr/wamr-compiler/build" >> $GITHUB_PATH

@@ -11,27 +11,30 @@ concurrency:
   cancel-in-progress: true
 
 jobs:
+  # 5 parallel benchmark jobs
+  # All share the same setup cache (setup-edgebox caches ALL outputs)
   benchmark:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    timeout-minutes: 60
+    timeout-minutes: 30
     strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
       matrix:
         benchmark:
           - name: startup
+            file: hello
             title: "Startup Time"
-            description: "Time to execute hello world (daemon uses warm pod)"
           - name: memory
+            file: memory
             title: "Memory Usage"
-            description: "Peak memory for 600k object allocation"
           - name: fib
+            file: fib
             title: "Fibonacci fib(45)"
-            description: "Recursive fibonacci - tests function call overhead"
           - name: loop
+            file: loop
             title: "Loop (array sum)"
-            description: "Sum 1M array elements - tests loop and array access"
           - name: tail_recursive
+            file: tail_recursive
             title: "Tail Recursive"
-            description: "Tail-recursive countdown - tests function call overhead"
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
@@ -41,21 +44,25 @@ jobs:
         uses: ./.github/actions/setup-edgebox
         with:
           install-hyperfine: 'true'
-          install-porffor: 'true'
+          install-porffor: 'false'
 
-      - name: Cache benchmark builds
+      - name: Cache benchmark build
+        id: bench-cache
         uses: actions/cache@v4
         with:
           path: |
-            zig-out/bin/bench/
-            zig-out/cache/bench/bundle_compiled.c
-          key: benchmark-builds-${{ hashFiles('bench/**/*.js', 'src/polyfills/**/*.js', 'build.zig') }}
-          restore-keys: |
-            benchmark-builds-
+            zig-out/bin/bench/${{ matrix.benchmark.file }}.*
+          key: benchmark-${{ matrix.benchmark.file }}-${{ hashFiles(format('bench/{0}.js', matrix.benchmark.file), 'src/polyfills/**/*.js', 'build.zig') }}
+
+      - name: Build benchmark
+        if: steps.bench-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
+        run: |
+          echo "Building ${{ matrix.benchmark.file }}..."
+          ./zig-out/bin/edgeboxc build bench/${{ matrix.benchmark.file }}.js
+          ls -la zig-out/bin/bench/
 
       - name: Run Benchmark - ${{ matrix.benchmark.title }}
         run: |
-          # Script writes to GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY automatically
           ./bench/run_hyperfine.sh --only=${{ matrix.benchmark.name }}
 
       - name: Upload Results
